repo_prior_art.cite: stat_sa_cate_pointwise_v1, “Structure-agnostic pointwise CATE minimax rate with a cross-fit local DR learner and a Le Cam converse,” is non-private and does not pose a central-DP Hölder observational CATE frontier with private-nuisance geometry.

published_prior_art.cite: KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE gives the non-private pointwise Hölder CATE benchmark; CaiChakrabortyVuursteen2024OptimalFederated gives pointwise private regression rates; SchroderMelnychukFeuerriegel2025DPCATE and NiuNoriQuistorffEtAl2022DPHeterogeneous provide DP CATE procedures, not this observational pointwise causal minimax frontier.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Turn the OEQ into paired upper- and lower-bound conjectures once a candidate privacy/nuisance phase exponent is derived; retain the present named local-HOIF and causal-DP-tracing routes as their constructions.

Add a worked finite-support or one-dimensional Hölder submodel that explicitly recovers both the Kennedy et al. privacy-free rate and the Cai et al. regression-private barrier before showing where joint nuisance perturbations can differ.
State a corollary identifying a concrete release-allocation rule across propensity, outcome-regression, and local-score components for a fixed privacy-budget regime.

recommended_next_step: Advance this field-tier observational central-DP CATE frontier to Stage 0.
